summary: Classified #47586 as the live canonical issue. The linked implementation PR #47589 is useful context but not merge-ready and merge/fix actions are blocked for this job. #52972 is related reminder-note work with a different root cause, and #37239 is already closed historical context.

actions.reason: #47586 is still the best live canonical issue for the memory-related reminder-guard false positive. No close action is appropriate because it is the canonical open tracker and the linked fix has not landed.

#47589 is the linked implementation path for #47586, but it is excluded as an actionable overlap ref in this job and is not merge-ready. Keep it open for the normal PR review or repair path rather than closing or merging it here.
#52972 is related reminder-note work, not a duplicate of #47586. It has a distinct cron-success suppression root cause and should remain open outside this cluster's closeout.
Already-closed context refs are historical evidence only and must not receive close actions.
